country|any_rival_country|Any country that is being rivaled by the country in a scope
country|any_rivaling_country|Any country that is rivaling the country in a scope
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|any_scope_admiral|Iterate through all admirals in a: country, interestgroup, or military formation
country|any_scope_ally|Iterate through all allies to a: country
law|any_scope_amendment|Iterate through amendments of the scoped law
country,front,hq|any_scope_army|Iterate through all armies currently present at input scope Supported scopes: country, front, hq
treaty|any_scope_article|Iterate through articles of the scoped treaty
treaty_options,treaty|any_scope_article_option|Iterate through article_options of the scoped treaty or treaty_options
country,state|any_scope_building|Iterate through all buildings in a: state, country
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|any_scope_character|Iterate through all characters in a: country, interestgroup, or front
market,state_region,strategic_region|any_scope_country|Iterate through all countries with a presence in the supported scope (currently: market, strategic region)
country,state|any_scope_culture|Iterate through all cultures in the scope
country|any_scope_diplomatic_pact|Any diplomatic pact of the country in a scope
country,hq|any_scope_fleet|Iterate through all fleets currently present at input scope Supported scopes: country, hq
war|any_scope_front|Iterate through all Fronts related to the scoped War
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|any_scope_general|Iterate through all generals in a: country, interestgroup, front, or military formation
country|any_scope_held_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers held by a country
country,culture|any_scope_homeland_state|Iterate through all states that are a homeland for the scoped culture, or a homeland of any primary culture of the scoped country
diplomatic_play|any_scope_initiator_ally|Iterate through all allies to an initiator in a: diplomatic play
country,state_region,strategic_region|any_scope_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers in a: country, strategic region, state region
journal_entry|any_scope_je_involved|Iterate through all involved in a journal entry
diplomatic_play|any_scope_play_involved|Iterate through all involved in a: diplomatic play
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|any_scope_politician|Iterate through all politicians in a: country or interestgroup
country,culture,interest_group,state|any_scope_pop|Iterate through all pops in a: country, state, interest group, culture
company|any_scope_regional_hqs|Iterate through regional HQs of the scoped company
country,military_formation|any_scope_ship|Iterate through all ships in a country or military formation
country,front,state_region,strait,strategic_region,theater|any_scope_state|Iterate through all states including provinces from a: country, state_region, theater, front, or strait
country,state|any_scope_strait|Iterate through all straits with a land endpoint in the scoped state or country
diplomatic_play|any_scope_target_ally|Iterate through all allies to a target in a: diplomatic play
country|any_scope_theater|Iterate through all theaters in a: country
country|any_scope_treaty|Iterate through in force treaties binding the scoped country
country|any_scope_violate_sovereignty_interested_parties|Iterate through all countries that would be interested if country in scope has their sovereignty violated
country|any_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars|Iterate through all relevant wars if target country had their sovereignty violated by scoped country
country|any_scope_war|Iterate through all wars related to the scope
state|any_sea_node_adjacent_state|Iterate through all states that share a sea node with a state
none|any_state|Iterate through all states globally

country|any_subject_of_subject|Any country below direct subjects in hierarchy
country|any_subject_or_below|Any country below current in hierarchy
political_movement|any_supporting_character|Iterate through all characters that support the scoped political movement
none|any_treaty|Iterate through treaties (both in force and drafts)
country|any_valid_mass_migration_culture|Lists for cultures in the scoped country that are valid for mass migration
war|any_war_participant|Iterate through all participants in a war
political_lobby|appeasement|Compares the appeasement of a political lobby.
country|approaching_bureaucracy_shortage|Check if Institutions in the country will incur a Bureaucracy shortage eventually
state|arable_land|Check arable land in state
country|arable_land_country|Compare arable land in *all* states
ship|armor|Compare a ship's armor
country|army_mobilization_option_fraction|Checks that a countries army has a certain percentage of units with a specific monbilization option scope:country
country|army_power_projection|Compare to a country's total army power projection  scope:example_country
none|assert_if|Conditionally cause an assert during run time
none|assert_read|Conditionally cause an assert during read time
country|authority|Compares the available authority of the scoped country
country|authority_usage|Compares the consumed authority of the scoped country
state|available_jobs|Checks the state's number of available jobs in non-subsistence buildings
country|average_country_infrastructure|Check average infrastructure in all states owned by scope country
country|average_incorporated_country_infrastructure|Check average infrastructure in incorporated states owned by the scope country
country|average_sol_for_culture|Compares the average standard of living for the target culture in the country
country|average_sol_for_primary_cultures|Compare average standard of living for primary cultures
country|average_sol_for_religion|Compares the average standard of living for the target religion in the country
country|average_sol_for_slaves|Compare average standard of living for enslaved pops
treaty_options,treaty|binds|Checks if the scoped treaty or treaty_options binds the given country scope:some_treaty
state|blockade_level|Compare to state's blockade level
building|building_has_goods_shortage|Check if building has a shortage of any of its inputs
country|bureaucracy|Compares the available bureaucracy of the scoped country
